tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: The number of 1.1. _________ (1.1) species worldwide has reached alarming levels. Rapid 1.2. _________ (1.2) has destroyed vast areas of natural habitat, leaving countless animals without shelter. Large-scale 1.3. _________ (1.3) has resulted in the clearing of tropical rainforests at an unprecedented rate. Wildlife 1.4. _________ (1.4) organisations work tirelessly to prevent the complete 1.5. _________ (1.5) of vulnerable species. The 1.6. _________ (1.6) of new breeding programmes requires approval from government 1.7. _________ (1.7). Scientists warn that without 1.8. _________ (1.8) funding and international cooperation, the ecological damage may become truly catastrophic.
